caption: The video displays a set of athlete statistics on a purple background. The top half of the screen contains the word "KEY" followed by a line. Below this, there are three categories: "SPD" with a value of "88", "ACC" with a value of "86", and "STR" with a value of "91". Each value is accompanied by a green progress bar. Below these stats, the word "GENERAL" is written with a line underneath it. As the clip progresses, the screen shifts downward to reveal more "GENERAL" information. A second "GENERAL" header appears, followed by a row of physical attributes: "HEIGHT" listed as "6' 5"", "WEIGHT" listed as "275", and another "STR" value of "91" with a corresponding green progress bar. The background remains a consistent dark purple throughout the movement.
